_note: Demo fixture. When the real news ingestion endpoint lands (see TerminalSnapshot design doc), the NewsService client-side fetcher will prefer /api/news and fall back to this only if the backend returns 404/503. Items here are handcrafted to cover common dynasty names so the filter surface has material to work with on arbitrary rosters.

items.headline: Bijan Robinson exits practice early with hamstring tightness
items.body: Falcons RB pulled from team drills after appearing uncomfortable. Practice report tomorrow will be telling.

items.headline: CeeDee Lamb extension talks gaining traction
items.body: Sources indicate Dallas is preparing to make Lamb the highest-paid WR.

items.headline: Jahmyr Gibbs expected to see expanded role in new scheme
items.body: OC's early spring language points to a bellcow workload.

items.headline: Justin Jefferson limited in offseason program after ankle cleanup
items.body: Precautionary per team source; full participation expected by OTAs.

items.headline: Breece Hall trade buzz quiets as Jets commit to ground game
items.body: Dynasty buyers pulled offers as staff signaled RB1 role is not in play.

items.headline: Puka Nacua undergoing minor knee procedure
items.body: Expected to miss rookie minicamp; Rams expect full OTA participation.

items.headline: Drake Maye named QB1 entering spring program
items.body: Patriots HC names Maye clear starter; expanded playbook from offseason.

items.headline: Tee Higgins extension reportedly stalled
items.body: Cincinnati and Higgins' camp remain apart on guarantees.

items.headline: Marvin Harrison Jr. cleared for full football activities
items.body: Cardinals WR completes offseason conditioning benchmark.

items.headline: Sam LaPorta enters concussion protocol after car accident
items.body: Lions TE undergoing standard evaluation; no structural concerns noted.

items.headline: De'Von Achane reclassified as primary ballcarrier
items.body: OC indicates Achane will see 18-22 touches per game in new scheme.

items.headline: Caleb Williams reportedly adjusting fast to Bears' new OC
items.body: Early throwing sessions have drawn strong reviews from position group.

items.headline: Trey McBride signs four-year extension
items.body: Cardinals lock in TE through 2029 at a TE-premium-valued number.

items.headline: Garrett Wilson sustains non-contact hamstring in conditioning
items.body: Jets WR expected to miss 2-3 weeks of offseason work.

items.headline: Brock Bowers praised for "elite" separation rate in spring film
items.body: Coaches highlighted route tree diversity vs. zone coverage.

items.headline: Saquon Barkley's role could shift with Eagles' new RB depth
items.body: Backfield splits expected to evolve through training camp.

items.headline: Joe Burrow throwing without restrictions for first time since injury
items.body: Bengals cautiously optimistic about full OTA participation.

items.headline: Rome Odunze named presumptive Bears WR1
items.body: Second-year leap narrative continues to build ahead of camp.

items.headline: Kyle Pitts dealing with lingering foot soreness
items.body: Falcons TE held out of some team drills as precaution.

items.headline: Tank Dell's role expanded after standout minicamp
items.body: Texans staff viewing Dell as a top-two option ahead of camp.

items.headline: Anthony Richardson showing mechanical improvements in offseason
items.body: Colts OC highlights footwork and base stability gains.

items.headline: Drake London in "best shape of his life," per teammates
items.body: Falcons WR1 role remains firmly in place for 2026.

items.headline: Kyren Williams day-to-day with ankle sprain
items.body: Rams RB expected back within the week; no structural damage.

items.headline: Malik Nabers reportedly dazzling in Giants installation
items.body: OC calls Nabers' route tree "already at a veteran level."
